pkgmetadata.longdescription:
A pure-Python tiling window manager.
Features ========
* Simple, small and extensible. It's easy to write your own layouts, widgets and commands. * Configured in Python. * Command shell that allow all aspects of Qtile to be managed and inspected. * Complete remote scriptability - write scripts to set up workspaces, manipulate windows, update status bar widgets and more. * Qtile's remote scriptability makes it one fo the most thoroughly unit-tested window managers around.

use.flag: Enable sending notifications with dbus.
Enable wayland as backend(requires additonal dependencies).
Enable X as backend(requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for wlan widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for KhalCalendar widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for wallpaper widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for sensors widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for volume widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for pulse-volume widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for nvidia-sensors widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for net widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for check-updates widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for mpri widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for mpd widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for moc widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for memory widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for launchbar widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for keyboardlayout widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for keyboardkbdd widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for imap widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for idlerpg widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for cpu widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for cmus widget (requires additonal dependencies).
Add support for bluetooth widget (requires additonal dependencies).
